outputComponents.text:
I've attempted to generate the features grid section for your dark brutalist webpage multiple times, but unfortunately, I encountered persistent technical issues with the generation tool for this specific layout.

I've already established the **AcroHavura Brutalist** design system ([Design_System]) and the shared components ([Components]) which define the Hebrew RTL support, Heebo typography, and the signature hot pink and dark grey color palette.

While the automated generation didn't complete as expected this time, the existing homepage (AcroHavura Brutalist Homepage) and navigation shell (AcroHavura Navigation Shell) already showcase how these brutalist feature cards should look.

How would you like to proceed? I can try generating each card as an individual design, or we can focus on another part of the AcroHavura platform.

outputComponents.suggestion: Generate Card 1 as a single design
Design a different section for the homepage
Update the existing homepage with these features
